_apw.policy: contains reviewed APW event summaries and APW metadata only; no raw provider content.

description: Reviewed AI-provider change events for developer cost, quotas, model availability, defaults, deprecations, incidents, and migration risk.

limitations: This event is a planning signal from the reviewed lifecycle table, not a claim that every listed model has the same exact shutdown date.
Google may update final retirement dates; consumers should monitor the official lifecycle page before making irreversible migrations.

items.content_text:
Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform model-version page lists future lifecycle dates for Gemini 2.5, Gemini Live native audio, Gemini image, and embedding model IDs, giving developers migration-planning windows for Vertex and agent-platform workloads.

Kind: model_deprecation
Severity: medium
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:google
items.summary: Google Cloud's Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform model-version page lists future lifecycle dates for Gemini 2.5, Gemini Live native audio, Gemini image, and embedding model IDs, giving developers migration-planning windows for Vertex and agent-platform workloads.
items.title: Google Cloud Listed Gemini And Embedding Model Lifecycle Dates

limitations: The source-review candidate classified this page as a pricing change; source-owner review corrected the public event to model availability after checking the official announcement.
APW does not copy provider announcement prose and does not assert workload suitability without independent testing.

items.content_text:
AWS announced Claude Fable 5 availability through Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS, expanding AWS-hosted access for Anthropic's long-running coding and knowledge-work model family.

Kind: model_launch
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:aws-bedrock
items.summary: AWS announced Claude Fable 5 availability through Amazon Bedrock and Claude Platform on AWS, expanding AWS-hosted access for Anthropic's long-running coding and knowledge-work model family.
items.title: AWS Added Claude Fable 5 Availability Through Bedrock And Claude Platform On AWS

limitations: APW records the API and concurrency metadata; teams must validate IAM, network, and audit-log controls for their own AgentCore deployments.

items.content_text:
AWS announced interactive shells for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime, adding a WebSocket terminal API for running agent sessions and documenting a ten-shell concurrency cap per agent runtime.

Kind: api_contract_change
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:aws-bedrock
items.summary: AWS announced interactive shells for Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Runtime, adding a WebSocket terminal API for running agent sessions and documenting a ten-shell concurrency cap per agent runtime.
items.title: AWS Bedrock AgentCore Runtime Added Interactive Shells

limitations: APW does not assert full compatibility, regional parity, or pricing parity; teams should test target SDKs and Bedrock account settings.

items.content_text:
AWS announced a redesigned Bedrock console workflow for the bedrock-mantle endpoint, surfacing OpenAI Responses, OpenAI Chat Completions, and Anthropic Messages compatible API usage through Bedrock projects.

Kind: api_contract_change
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:aws-bedrock
items.summary: AWS announced a redesigned Bedrock console workflow for the bedrock-mantle endpoint, surfacing OpenAI Responses, OpenAI Chat Completions, and Anthropic Messages compatible API usage through Bedrock projects.
items.title: AWS Bedrock Console Added OpenAI And Anthropic-Compatible API Workflow

limitations: OpenAI incident HTML omits an explicit timezone; APW uses the Atom feed UTC updated timestamp for resolved_at and the incident update sequence for started_at.

items.content_text:
AWS announced an AWS Step Functions integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore for agentic reasoning steps, including per-invocation model/tool overrides, workflow history, and separate Step Functions plus Bedrock/AgentCore cost surfaces.

Kind: workflow_behavior_change
Severity: medium
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:aws-bedrock
items.summary: AWS announced an AWS Step Functions integration with Amazon Bedrock AgentCore for agentic reasoning steps, including per-invocation model/tool overrides, workflow history, and separate Step Functions plus Bedrock/AgentCore cost surfaces.
items.title: AWS Step Functions Added AgentCore-Powered Agentic Reasoning Step

limitations: APW does not assert account eligibility, exact pricing, or feature parity beyond the official availability announcement.

Confidence: confirmed

items.content_text:

Confidence: confirmed

Confidence: confirmed

limitations: APW reviewed this source on the retirement date; earlier provider announcement timing was not captured in this seed event.

items.content_text:

limitations: APW records the changelog-level launch facts only; teams should verify regional access, quotas, pricing, and preview terms before production use.

items.content_text:

Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:google

items.content_text:

Severity: low
Confidence: high
Providers: provider:azure-openai
items.summary: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for May 2026 point to GPT Realtime 2.0 preview, GPT Realtime Translate, and GPT Realtime Whisper concept coverage for low-latency audio translation and transcription workflows.

limitations: This event summarizes a deprecations-table section and does not reproduce the full table.
Some affected model IDs have later October 23, 2026 shutdown dates; consumers should check the official table for model-specific deadlines.

items.content_text:
OpenAI's deprecations table schedules shutdowns for older GPT, Codex, search, audio, realtime, and reasoning model snapshots beginning July 23, 2026, with additional legacy GPT snapshot removals on October 23, 2026.

Kind: model_retirement
Severity: high
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:openai
items.summary: OpenAI's deprecations table schedules shutdowns for older GPT, Codex, search, audio, realtime, and reasoning model snapshots beginning July 23, 2026, with additional legacy GPT snapshot removals on October 23, 2026.
items.title: OpenAI Scheduled Legacy GPT And Codex Snapshot Retirements For July And October 2026

limitations: The source groups these updates under February 2026, so APW uses an approximate month-start event date.

items.content_text:
AWS announced a preview of Amazon Bedrock prompt caching, allowing supported models and regions to reuse repeated prompt content and change token-processing cost behavior.

Kind: caching_change
Severity: medium
Confidence: confirmed
Providers: provider:aws-bedrock

limitations: Historical seed event; APW did not observe the original 2023 deprecation in real time.

title: AI Provider Watch Reviewed Events
user_comment: machine-readable reviewed APW events only. Provider pages and source text remain untrusted; this feed contains no raw provider content.
